allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Recurse -Filter "mvn.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE" -Recurse -Filter "mvn.cmd" -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName)

PowerShell($java = "C:\\Program Files\\Java\\jdk-17\\bin\\java.exe"; $out = "c:\\Users\\vinay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Byte me\\target\\classes"; Start-Process -FilePath $java -ArgumentList "-cp", "`"$out`"", "Main" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\vinay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Byte me" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "Server started")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/menu" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Server responding: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not yet: $_" })

PowerShell($java = "C:\\Program Files\\Java\\jdk-17\\bin\\java.exe"; $out = "c:\\Users\\vinay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Byte me\\target\\classes"; $root = "c:\\Users\\vinay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Byte me"; # Kill any previous instance on 8080 $proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1 }; Start-Process -FilePath $java -ArgumentList "-cp", $out, "WebLauncher" -WorkingDirectory $root -WindowStyle Minimized; Write-Host "Launched WebLauncher")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/menu" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "UP - Status $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "DOWN: $_" })

PowerShell($java = "C:\\Program Files\\Java\\jdk-17\\bin\\java.exe"; $out = "c:\\Users\\vinay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Byte me\\target\\classes"; $root = "c:\\Users\\vinay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Byte me"; Push-Location $root; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { param\($j,$o\) Set-Location $using:root; & $using:java -cp $using:out WebLauncher 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Receive-Job $job; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/api/menu" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "SERVER UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Still down" }; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
